name: Bestow Curse

effects.description: Touch one creature and force a Wisdom save; on a failure, choose one curse for the duration: Disadvantage on checks and saves with one ability score, Disadvantage on attacks against you, a start-turn Wisdom save that can waste the target action, +1d8 Necrotic damage from your attacks and spells, or a DM-approved alternative no stronger than those options. Remove Curse ends the curse, and higher slots extend duration or remove Concentration as listed in the scaling table.

aiContext.prompt: Choose which curse option applies if the target fails the Wisdom saving throw.

options.label: Ability Curse
options.summary: Choose one ability score; the target has Disadvantage on ability checks and saving throws made with that ability.
options.duration: Concentration duration, extended by higher-level slot

options.label: Attack Curse
options.summary: The target has Disadvantage on attack rolls against the caster.
options.duration: Concentration duration, extended by higher-level slot

options.label: Action-Wasting Curse
options.summary: At the start of each of its turns, the target makes a Wisdom save; on a failure, it wastes its action doing nothing.
options.duration: Concentration duration, extended by higher-level slot

options.label: Extra Necrotic Damage
options.summary: The caster's attacks and spells deal an extra 1d8 Necrotic damage to the cursed target.
options.duration: Concentration duration, extended by higher-level slot

options.label: Alternative Curse
options.summary: Use a DM-approved alternative curse that is no stronger than the listed options.
options.duration: Concentration duration, extended by higher-level slot
options.notes: This option requires adjudication before runtime can execute it mechanically.

modeChoice.notes: The chosen curse only applies after the target fails the initial Wisdom saving throw; Remove Curse ends the effect.

description: You touch a creature, which must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or become cursed for the duration. Until the curse ends, the target suffers one of the following effects of your choice:
higherLevels: Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. If you cast this spell using a level 4 spell slot, you can maintain Concentration on it for up to 10 minutes. If you use a level 5+ spell slot, the spell doesn't require Concentration, and the duration becomes 8 hours (level 5-6 slot) or 24 hours (level 7-8 slot). If you use a level 9 spell slot, the spell lasts until dispelled.

entries.4: duration up to 10 minutes with concentration

higherLevelScaling.notes: Higher slots change both Bestow Curse's duration and whether concentration is required.
